title: Test Automation
description: Building reliable E2E, API, and integration test suites with Playwright, Selenium, and Python. CI/CD pipeline integration with Jenkins and OpenShift.

title: Infrastructure & DevOps
description: Self-hosted homelab with Docker, Kubernetes, Prometheus, Grafana. 55+ services across 3 Raspberry Pi nodes. TrueNAS storage and automated pipelines.

title: Backend Development
description: Python Flask/Gunicorn, Go/Gin APIs, PostgreSQL + Redis. Telegram bots, subscription systems with Mercado Pago PIX, and content delivery platforms.
